3d_model.notes: 3D conceptual massing model complete — two-story clinical building on 3,500 sqm urban lot in La Paz. Ground floor: public/clinical zone (reception, consultorios, urgencias, rayos-X, farmacia). Second floor: support zone (laboratorio, enfermería, administración). Ambulance access from east side of lot, main patient entry from street frontage. Clean/dirty circulation separation achieved with dedicated service corridor on north side.

renders.key_perspectives: Street-facing facade, ambulance/emergency access side elevation, interior reception hall with clinical zoning diagram overlay, aerial site plan view showing parking layout and accessible routes

material_direction.notes: Clinical durability emphasis: exterior — painted precast concrete panels with aluminum curtain wall at entrance; interior clinical zones — seamless epoxy flooring (antimicrobial), cleanable wall surfaces, acoustic ceiling tile in consultorios. Color palette: white and warm gray primary, accent of warm terra verde in reception to reduce clinical coldness while maintaining professional standard.

color_direction.notes: Clinical white and light gray primary palette for all clinical zones (infection control priority). Warm green accent in reception and waiting to create welcoming environment. High-contrast signage colors for wayfinding accessibility (COFEPRIS accessibility requirement). No dark or pattern surfaces in clinical areas.

space_arrangement.notes: Floor plan matches approved area program: 10 consultorios × 20 sqm, urgencias 120 sqm, laboratorio 80 sqm, farmacia 60 sqm, recepción/espera 150 sqm, rayos-X 40 sqm (radiation shielding flagged), enfermería 60 sqm, administración 80 sqm, 4 sanitarios × 15 sqm, estacionamiento 400 sqm, circulación 250 sqm. Clean corridor/dirty corridor separation confirmed in plan. Total programmed area 1,500 sqm — matches seed data program.

review_notes: Concept design fully addresses clinical workflow requirements and matches the approved area program without deviations. All five deliverables are complete. The infection control zoning — clean corridor (consultorios + urgencias side) versus dirty service corridor (lab + waste flow side) — is clearly established in the spatial arrangement and will drive engineering Phase 3 HVAC pressure differential zoning. COFEPRIS facility category confirmed: private outpatient clinic with diagnostic and emergency services. Recommend approval to advance to Phase 2 Architectural Design.
